fees_raw:
B.Tech Programs: Admission Fee ₹10,000, Tuition Fee ₹45,000 per semester, Development Fee ₹5,000 per semester, Library Fee ₹1,000 per semester. Total Semester Fee is ₹51,000.
M.Tech Programs: Admission Fee ₹15,000, Tuition Fee ₹60,000 per semester. Scholarships available for GATE qualified students.
MBA Program: Admission Fee ₹12,000, Tuition Fee ₹55,000 per semester.
Hostel Fees: Boarding & Lodging ₹35,000 per semester, Mess Charges approximately ₹4,000 per month, Security Deposit ₹10,000.
eligibility: Candidates must have passed 12th with minimum 60% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. A valid JEE Main or WBJEE score is required. Age should be between 17 and 25 years as of 31st December 2025.
admission_dates: Application starts on 1st June 2025 and ends on 30th June 2025. The entrance exam is on 15th July 2025, and results will be declared on 30th July 2025. Counseling is from 1st to 15th August 2025. Classes start on 1st September 2025.
required_documents: 10th and 12th Mark Sheets and Certificates, JEE Main or WBJEE Score Card, Transfer and Migration Certificates, Caste Certificate, Domicile Certificate, 6 passport size photos, Aadhar Card, and Income Certificate for scholarships.
admission_process_steps: Step 1: Visit bcrec.edu.in and click Admissions. Step 2: Fill the online form. Step 3: Upload scanned documents. Step 4: Pay ₹1,000 application fee online. Step 5: Submit and print the form.
reservation_policy: SC: 22%, ST: 6%, OBC-A: 17%, OBC-B: 7%, PWD: 3%, and General: 45%.

contact_info.address: Jemua Road, Fuljhore, Durgapur - 713206, West Bengal, India
contact_info.hours: Mon-Fri: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Sat: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
